artifacts.purpose: Completed real coach reviewer IDs and 1-5 score cells; never embedded in this packet.

artifacts.purpose: Share-safe composition readiness report without raw worksheet or reviewer values.

artifacts.label: Cue-validation dataset JSON
artifacts.purpose: Gate-compatible dataset written only from a ready completed worksheet.

artifacts.label: Cue-validation dataset report
artifacts.purpose: Doctor report proving the composed dataset passed validation checks.

commands.label: Cue-validation starter kit
commands.purpose: Generate share-safe seed, intake, onboarding, and blank worksheet artifacts from a real Sessions seed.

commands.label: Cue-validation composition packet
commands.purpose: Refresh composition readiness without writing a dataset or exposing worksheet contents.

commands.label: Compose cue-validation dataset
commands.purpose: Write the dataset JSON only when the completed worksheet preflight is ready.

commands.label: Cue-validation gate
commands.purpose: Validate the composed dataset before production movement-quality claims.

commands.label: Cue-validation dataset doctor
commands.purpose: Write the share-safe dataset report used by release readiness.

commands.label: Model evidence sync
commands.purpose: Promote real-world model evidence only after the cue-validation dataset report is ready.
